SHORT NAME: PRVDR_BASE_FAC_CCN_NUM 
LONG NAME: PRVDR_BASE_FAC_CCN_NUM 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
6 
SOURCE: 
NCH (base) 
VALUES: 
— 
COMMENT: 
This field was new in 2021. Prior to 2021, the CCN was populated in the PRVDR_NUM field. For 2021+ a 
subset of provider types also has a populated value for PRVDR_BASE_FAC_CCN_NUM. 
This field is populated from the provider number (the CCN), from the first claim record included in the 
stay,
